news.title:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.
news.summary:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.

news.title: Dr. Reddy's Labs will review Q4 results on May 12, revealing financial insights.
news.summary: Dr. Reddy's Labs will review Q4 results on May 12, revealing financial insights.

news.title:
Dr. Reddy's launches India's first DCGI-approved Semaglutide injection, Obeda, for Type 2 diabetes.
The new product, Obeda, strengthens Dr. Reddy's portfolio in diabetes treatment.
news.summary:
Dr. Reddy's launches India's first DCGI-approved Semaglutide injection, Obeda, for Type 2 diabetes.
The new product, Obeda, strengthens Dr. Reddy's portfolio in diabetes treatment.

news.title:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.
news.summary:
Mutual funds overweight on pharma, healthcare as growth visibility improves; sector accounts for 7.3% of portfolios in Feb 2026.
Pharma stocks like Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Biocon outperform Nifty 50; long-term returns strong despite risks like regulation and competition.

news.title:
Generic drugmakers like Ajanta Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin to launch semaglutide versions as Novo's patent expires.
Prices may drop 40-50%; healthcare facilities like Apollo, Fortis expand obesity services to meet rising demand.
news.summary:
Generic drugmakers like Ajanta Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Lupin to launch semaglutide versions as Novo's patent expires.
Prices may drop 40-50%; healthcare facilities like Apollo, Fortis expand obesity services to meet rising demand.

news.title:
Dr Reddy's SA halts phase III trial of lung cancer drug eftilagimod alfa after IDMC interim analysis.
Dr Reddy's shares fell 2.3% to ₹1,288.40 on BSE; Immutep reviews data for next steps in drug program.
news.summary:
Dr Reddy's SA halts phase III trial of lung cancer drug eftilagimod alfa after IDMC interim analysis.
Dr Reddy's shares fell 2.3% to ₹1,288.40 on BSE; Immutep reviews data for next steps in drug program.

news.title:
Dr. Reddy's advised to stop TACTI-004 Phase III trial after interim analysis showed no progress.
ImmuneP enrollment also halted and TACTI-004 Phase III study to be closed.
news.summary:
Dr. Reddy's advised to stop TACTI-004 Phase III trial after interim analysis showed no progress.

news.title:
Delhi HC approves Dr Reddy's export of Semaglutide to selected countries.
Dr Reddy's Semaglutide medication gains export clearance from Delhi HC.

news.title:
Dr Reddy's Srikakulam facility inspection classified as VAI by USFDA; EIR issued.
Shares of Dr Reddy's rose 1.2% to ₹1,307 on BSE after positive regulatory updates.
news.summary:

news.title:
Dr. Reddy's faces potential delay in Semaglutide's Canada launch due to dam cap issues.
Sandoz expects Brazil/Canada approvals to slip to H2 CY26 from H1 CY26 guidance.
news.summary:

news.title:
IT stocks lead recovery post Anthropic-triggered selloff; Nifty reclaims 25,500, Sensex gains 485.2 points to trade at 82,711.1.
Infosys, HCLTECH, TCS, TECHM top Nifty gainers; Dr. Reddy's, MAXHEALTH, SBI among losers; FIIs net sellers at ₹102.5 crore.

Tata Sons deferred reappointing N Chandrasekaran; Noel Tata raised concerns.

news.title:
Global PE firms like General Atlantic and KKR are exploring a $150-200M investment in Synthimed Labs, valuing it at $1B ahead of its IPO.
Synthimed, backed by IndiaRF, specializes in APIs with 86% export revenue. Intense competition includes Sun Pharma, Cipla, and Dr. Reddy's.

news.title:
GIFT Nifty signals a weak start; Nifty futures down 0.5% at 25,592.5. Sensex gained 479.95 points, closing at 83,294.66.
Top Nifty gainers: Adani Ports, Dr. Reddy's, Kotak Mahindra. IT sector fell 1.4%, PSU Bank index rose 1.3%; volatility persists.
